spec.description: Loki v2/v3 SSH Logs - Ubuntu 24.04 Compatible

spec.expr: {$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Accepted" | pattern `<_> Accepted <_> for <username> from <_>` | __error__=""

{$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |~": Invalid|: Connection closed by authenticating user|: Failed .* user" | pattern `<_> user <username> <_> port` | __error__=""
{$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Failed" !~"invalid user" | pattern `<_> for <username> from <_> port` | __error__=""

sum by (username) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Accepted" | pattern `<_> Accepted <_> for <username> from <_>` | __error__="" [$__interval]))

sum by (username) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |~": Invalid|: Connection closed by authenticating user|: Failed .* user" | pattern `<_> user <username> <_> port` | __error__="" [$__interval]))

sum by (username) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Failed" !~"invalid user" | pattern `<_> for <username> from <_> port` | __error__="" [$__interval]))

count by (ip) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |~": Invalid|: Connection closed by authenticating user|: Failed" |~".* from .*" | pattern `<_> from <ip> port` | __error__="" [$__interval]))

count by (ip) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |~": Invalid|: Connection closed by authenticating user|: Failed" !~".* from .*" | pattern `<_> user <_> <ip> port` | __error__="" [$__interval]))
sum by(instance) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Accepted" | __error__="" [$__interval]))

spec.title: Session Opened by User and IP

spec.expr: {$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Accepted" | pattern `<_> Accepted <_> for <username> from <ip> port <_>` | __error__=""

count by (ip) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |~": Invalid|: Connection closed by authenticating user|: Failed" |~".* from .*" | pattern `<_> from <ip> port` | __error__="" [$__interval]))

count by (ip) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |~": Invalid|: Connection closed by authenticating user|: Failed" !~".* from .*" | pattern `<_> user <_> <ip> port` | __error__="" [$__interval]))

count by (ip) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Accepted" | pattern `<_> Accepted <_> for <_> from <ip> port <_>` | __error__="" [$__interval]))

spec.title: SSH Failure by User and IP

spec.expr: {$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |~": Invalid|: Failed .* user" | pattern `<_> user <username> from <ip> <_> port` | __error__=""
{$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Failed" !~"invalid user" | pattern `<_> for <username> from <ip> port` | __error__=""
{$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |=": Connection closed by authenticating user" | pattern `<_> user <username> <ip> port` | __error__=""

sum by(instance) (count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" |~": Failed|: Invalid|: Connection closed by authenticating user" | __error__="" [$__interval]))
count_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" | __error__="" [$__interval])
bytes_over_time({$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd[" | __error__="" [$__interval])
{$label_name=~"$label_value", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} |="sshd["

spec.title: SSH Logs (Ubuntu 24.04)-v2
